inputs.label: Room Area
inputs.businessContext: Total floor area of the room to be conditioned

businessContext_i18n.en: Total floor area of the room to be conditioned
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface totale au sol de la pièce à climatiser
businessContext_i18n.es: Superficie total del suelo de la habitación a climatizar
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي مساحة أرضية الغرفة المراد تكييفها

inputs.label: Ceiling Height
inputs.businessContext: Average ceiling height of the room

businessContext_i18n.en: Average ceiling height of the room
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur moyenne sous plafond de la pièce
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura media del techo de la habitación

inputs.label: Number of Occupants
inputs.businessContext: Maximum number of people typically present in the room

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum number of people typically present in the room
businessContext_i18n.tr: Odada tipik olarak bulunan maksimum kişi sayısı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre maximum de personnes habituellement présentes dans la pièce
businessContext_i18n.es: Número máximo de personas normalmente presentes en la habitación
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد الأقصى لعدد الأشخاص الموجودين عادة في الغرفة

inputs.label: Window Area
inputs.businessContext: Total glazed area of windows and external doors

businessContext_i18n.en: Total glazed area of windows and external doors
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pencerelerin ve dış kapıların toplam cam alanı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface vitrée totale des fenêtres et portes extérieures
businessContext_i18n.es: Superficie total acristalada de ventanas y puertas exteriores
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي مساحة الزجاج للنوافذ والأبواب الخارجية

businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura exterior de diseño (pico de verano)
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة الهواء الخارجي التصميمية (ذروة الصيف)
درجة حرارة نقطة الضبط الداخلية المطلوبة

formulas.sensible_heat_gain_kw: (room_area * ceiling_height * (outdoor_temperature - indoor_temperature) * insulation_factor * 0.1 + window_area * (outdoor_temperature - indoor_temperature) * 5 + number_of_occupants * 75 + room_area * 10) / 1000
formulas.required_cooling_capacity_kw: (room_area * ceiling_height * (outdoor_temperature - indoor_temperature) * insulation_factor * 0.1 + window_area * (outdoor_temperature - indoor_temperature) * 5 + number_of_occupants * 150 + room_area * 10) / 1000

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
